feedback.text: Dear European Commission, I speak as a citizen of the European Union. I would like to express my opinion on the growing problem of take-off, and I would even call it theft of a digital product which I have purchased entirely legally, without being reimbursed. This is an alarming situation where corporations/companies ‘sell’ digital products to consumers under unfavourable conditions. When buying a digital good, we often have no choice or influence on whether the seller will take it for any reason.
